[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100001 3
1 11001010 4
2 11010111 6
3 01001110 4
4 00000000 a
5 11011110 6
6 10111111 7
7 01001111 5

01 01000000 1

23 01000101 3
34 10011010 4

56 00001000 1
67 10010001 3
70 00000000 a match 4
